title: Placer Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Placer with a Z-Score of +4.80. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Placer is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is approximately 6.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat stress, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
